channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Indian-Origin Man Jailed For 34 Years In UK For Kidnapping And Rape
item.description: The court heard that the woman became suspicious when she was asked to deliver a suitcase containing unknown items from Thailand back to the UK in June 2024.
item.content:encoded: The court heard that the woman became suspicious when she was asked to deliver a suitcase containing unknown items from Thailand back to the UK in June 2024.

item.title: As Trump Predicts Iran War's End, Some Objectives Unfulfilled

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war.

item.description: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war, with a memorandum of understanding to be signed in the coming days.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump said the US is close to signing a deal with Iran to wind down the war, with a memorandum of understanding to be signed in the coming days.

item.title: US Open To Iran Civilian Nuclear Programme
item.description: The clarification came as a senior administration official outlined details of a proposed US-Iran nuclear agreement that officials said could be signed within days.
item.content:encoded: The clarification came as a senior administration official outlined details of a proposed US-Iran nuclear agreement that officials said could be signed within days.

item.title: EU To Bar Airlines From Charging Parents To Sit With Children

media:content.media:description: But the plans were ditched after months of negotiations.

item.description: EU countries had wanted to trim the compensation air carriers currently have to pay out for cancelled flights and long delays.
item.content:encoded: EU countries had wanted to trim the compensation air carriers currently have to pay out for cancelled flights and long delays.

item.title: Pak Targets 18% Increase In Tax Revenue As Inflation Sparks Public Outcry

media:content.media:description: Petrol prices in Pakistan have soared more than 40 per cent.

item.description: Pakistan seeks to meet fiscal targets agreed with the International Monetary Fund (IMF).
item.content:encoded: Pakistan seeks to meet fiscal targets agreed with the International Monetary Fund (IMF).

item.title: Expert Explains How Tepid US Response Aided Ebola Spread In Congo

media:content.media:description: Dr Jha said the outbreak is expanding.

item.description: Dr Ashish Jha blamed the Donald Trump administration's funding cuts for a muted global response to the outbreak in DR Congo.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1112332/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Dr Ashish Jha blamed the Donald Trump administration's funding cuts for a muted global response to the outbreak in DR Congo.

item.title: 2.5 Lakh Ford Focus Cars Recalled Over Possible Unexpected Engine Stalls

media:content.media:description: The recall includes 255,404 Ford Focus automobiles.

item.description: To fix the problem, dealers will provide a powertrain software update free of charge.
item.content:encoded: To fix the problem, dealers will provide a powertrain software update free of charge.

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard Reveals US Funding For 120 Biolabs In Over 30 Countries

media:content.media:description: Tulsi Gabbard criticised previous administrations and health officials.

item.description: The Office of the Director of National Intelligence statement indicated that many of these facilities have engaged in research involving hazardous and highly contagious pathogens, including "Gain-of-Function" research, with what the DNI described as minimal oversight.
item.content:encoded: The Office of the Director of National Intelligence statement indicated that many of these facilities have engaged in research involving hazardous and highly contagious pathogens, including "Gain-of-Function" research, with what the DNI described as minimal oversight.

item.title: El Nino Raises Ocean Temperatures: How Marine Life Could Be Affected

media:content.media:description: El Nino can wreak havoc on the many marine ecosystems

item.description: With an El Nino expected to strengthen through the summer and fall, water temperatures will heat up even more. It's time to start preparing.
item.content:encoded: With an El Nino expected to strengthen through the summer and fall, water temperatures will heat up even more. It's time to start preparing.

item.title: From Anti-War Sketch To Exile: Russian Father And Daughter Defy Putin

media:content.media:description: The Kremlin defended the case, describing Moskalyov's parenting as "deplorable".

item.description: Alexei Moskalyov said police showed him Maria's drawing for the first time. He insisted that they had done nothing wrong.
item.content:encoded: Alexei Moskalyov said police showed him Maria's drawing for the first time. He insisted that they had done nothing wrong.

item.title: Elon Musk Becomes World's 1st Trillionaire After SpaceX Shares Surge On Debut
item.description: Elon Musk Becomes World's 1st Trillionaire After SpaceX Shares Surge On Debut
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk Becomes World's 1st Trillionaire After SpaceX Shares Surge On Debut

item.title: Key US Surveillance Program Set To Expire. What It Means

media:content.media:description: The expiration is likely to be the first meaningful lapse of Section 702 since it was created.

item.description: The program is seen as vital in preventing terror attacks and catching foreign spies
item.content:encoded: The program is seen as vital in preventing terror attacks and catching foreign spies

item.title: Mediator Pakistan Says Iran-US Peace Deal Text 'Agreed'

media:content.media:description: Pakistan has been mediating between the two sides for months.

item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi insisted on Friday that a deal with the United States to end the war in the Middle East had never been closer.
item.content:encoded: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi insisted on Friday that a deal with the United States to end the war in the Middle East had never been closer.

item.title: Trump, Netanyahu Started Iran War, Their Political Goals Are Now Causing Rift

media:content.media:description: The biggest reason behind the growing gap between Trump and Netanyahu is politics at home

item.description: Trump is looking ahead to the US midterm elections in November and wants to bring the unpopular Iran war to an end. Netanyahu, who also faces elections this year, has a different challenge.
item.content:encoded: Trump is looking ahead to the US midterm elections in November and wants to bring the unpopular Iran war to an end. Netanyahu, who also faces elections this year, has a different challenge.

item.title: 1 Dead, 9 Injured In Texas Shooting

media:content.media:description: It sounded like at least 40 shots were fired, witnesses said.

item.description: Video from Mendias showed a number of officers pouring out of the back of an armoured police vehicle. Police were also sending robots into the area.
item.content:encoded: Video from Mendias showed a number of officers pouring out of the back of an armoured police vehicle. Police were also sending robots into the area.

item.title: Araghchi Says US-Iran Deal Has "Never Been Closer", Trump Shares His Post

media:content.media:description: Araghchi's comments came after Donald Trump said a peace deal will be signed soon.

item.description: US-Iran Deal Has 'Never Been Closer', Says Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Deal Has 'Never Been Closer', Says Iran Foreign Minister Araghchi

item.title: Trump Claims Iran Tried To Attack Indian Ships With Drones, Slams Deal 'Leak'

media:content.media:description: After an attack on a Palau-flagged tanker MT Settebello, three Indian sailors died

item.description: US President Donald Trump's comment comes after three vessels with Indian crew came under attack off the Omani coast this week.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump's comment comes after three vessels with Indian crew came under attack off the Omani coast this week.

item.title: Iran Reiterates Right To Enrich Uranium As Trump Teases Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: Iran the US would hold 60 days of talks.

item.description: US ally Israel has said that Trump had promised it that any agreement would see Iran stripped of its enriched nuclear material, but Tehran's official IRNA news agency said this was not even on the table.
item.content:encoded: US ally Israel has said that Trump had promised it that any agreement would see Iran stripped of its enriched nuclear material, but Tehran's official IRNA news agency said this was not even on the table.

item.title: International Labour Organisation Adopts First Treaty On Gig Workers' Safety

media:content.media:description: Until now, labour practices have struggled to keep pace with the dramatic shifts in the way people work.

item.description: The Decent Work in the Platform Economy Convention is aimed at extending labour protections to hundreds of millions of people worldwide who work through digital platforms, in areas like food delivery and car services.
item.content:encoded: The Decent Work in the Platform Economy Convention is aimed at extending labour protections to hundreds of millions of people worldwide who work through digital platforms, in areas like food delivery and car services.

item.title: How US 'Dark Fleet' Moved 100 Million Oil Barrels Out Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Trump said more than 200 commercial ships passed through the waterway during this period.

item.description: Evidence analysed through Open-Source Intelligence research by NDTV Datafy, along with inputs from maritime analysts and media reports, suggests that the US military and its regional allies operated a "dark fleet" of vessels to send oil to the international market.
item.content:encoded: Evidence analysed through Open-Source Intelligence research by NDTV Datafy, along with inputs from maritime analysts and media reports, suggests that the US military and its regional allies operated a "dark fleet" of vessels to send oil to the international market.
